title: MMS Special Forces vs Horror
description: Modded Monstrosity Series adventure + horror! Gang up with your friends to defeat every horror mod.
body:
Team up with your friends to defeat many of the **scariest** horror mods. 
Some mods included are:
-  The One Who Watches
- The Man From the Fog
- The Boiled One (Reimagined)
  
Armed with TACZ and Marbleds Arsenal for a premium experience against the unknown.

Optional addon: Oculus for shaders :)

Any bugs or questions go to my discord here: [Bugs and Other](https://discord.gg/wZBKbgGVSa)
